name: ZetaDisplay AB (publ)
summary: ZetaDisplay AB (publ) provides digital signage solutions. The company also offers ZetaDisplay Engage CMS platform; and ZetaTouch, a service that links the physical store with its e-commerce. It serves retail, automotive, banking and finance, corporate communication, transportation, public sector, gaming and lottery, and fashion industries, as well as convenience stores, fast food centers, and restaurants. The company has operations in Sweden, Denmark, Norway, Finland, the Netherlands, and the United States. ZetaDisplay AB (publ) is headquartered in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
